work.title: TalentMapper
highlights: One of the first in-house engineers as development moved in-house
Led Ant Design 6 & React 19 migration into a high-performance React SPA
Built Gemini skill suggestions, CV pipeline, and Metabase analytics platform
work.description: Talent-intelligence SaaS — one of the first in-house engineers as development moved in-house. Led the Ant Design 6 and React 19 migration and re-architected the Gatsby front end into a high-performance React SPA. Owned the Axios / TanStack Query REST migration, built Gemini-powered skill suggestions and a CV-processing pipeline, and deployed Metabase as the company analytics platform. Took formal ownership of the bug backlog and expanded into GCP, Grafana, and Terraform.

work.title: Freelance / Contract
highlights: Ticket Tiger — React Native ticketing app with WhatsApp automation
Forms Offline & Social Schedule for d3-digital (Stripe, 2FA, calendar sync)
Bespoke business and e-commerce solutions alongside full-time roles
work.description: Contract work alongside full-time roles. Delivered Ticket Tiger's React Native (Expo) ticketing app with WhatsApp automation and check-in features; built Forms Offline and Social Schedule for d3-digital (offline sync, Stripe, 2FA, and calendar integrations); plus bespoke business and e-commerce solutions.

work.title: Kukd.com
highlights: Progressed Junior → Software Engineer on a 50k+ monthly user platform
Led Next.js v8–v15 upgrade and owned Bvaah wedding-planning app
React, React Native & Flutter apps with Stripe, AWS, and Firebase
work.description: Takeaway ordering and table-reservation platform — progressed from Junior Developer to Software Engineer. Led the Next.js v8–v15 upgrade, owned Bvaah (wedding-planning app), and delivered React, React Native and Flutter apps serving 50,000+ customers monthly. Built for Euro Foods Group and Masala Bazaar, integrated Stripe and Checkout.com, optimised Express/Knex APIs, and deployed on AWS with GA4 and Firebase.

work.title: La Fosse Academy
highlights: Led team delivery of a full-stack booking platform
Built CITY 72 — React adventure game with AI-generated narratives
work.description: Intensive full-stack bootcamp with Agile delivery practice. Graduated at 96%, leading a team to deliver a full-stack booking platform and building CITY 72 — a React adventure game with AI-generated narratives.

education.title: Certifications
education.description: APMG Scrum Master (2026) · Google Cloud Associate Cloud Engineer (ongoing, 2026) · AWS Certified Cloud Practitioner (ongoing, 2026) · Agile & Scrum Fundamentals, La Fosse Academy (2023)
